text.message: Definitely hitting oj a bunch for that
bro I dropped a single road
why am I getting so many robs?
Why did we give him sheep here
We took worse spots to get the sheep, stop giving it to blue or it’s gg
and red is the real menace
red probably has army by now
Want me to get army off him?
Try to connect after settle you can have my mats
Ok, take this road on your turn
How we balanced this game oj… I have no idea
its insane what we pulled black
You must both be so proud
It felt like the game was done for the 2 of us
So you cheated to bring it back
No mono here on my end so be careful with your grain
So you guys should pull more
Everyone on 9 here but blue monos
